comment: Buyer storefront seed (MT9). Per-persona starting cart + notifications. Backs GET/POST /cart/{persona}, GET /notifications/{persona}, POST /checkout/{persona}. Cart lines carry the fit-proof recommended size (shoe UK 9, kurta L). The hero notification points at the idle monitor (SL-002 / B0MONITOR1) so a tap flows into the radar→liquidity resell. upi_vpa is a demo VPA — checkout is an API-returned confirmation, no real payment.

notifications.title: Your NestCam Baby Monitor
notifications.body: 3 buyers are searching “baby monitor” within 4 km. Idle 19 months in your home — resell it on Second Life?
